description: Student of the Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering at UOC. Specialized in Web Development and Computer Engineering.

experience.title: Air and Space Army
tasks: Repair and maintenance of radio equipment

projects.name: SimRadio
projects.description: Web environment for simulating tests on radio transceivers in Rx.

aboutme: My name is Francisco Medinilla and I am a student of the Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering at UOC. I started in the programming world with the Scratch cat. From there, I took a big leap to one of the most loved and at the same time most hated programming languages, C++.
It was in C++ where I acquired solid knowledge regarding programming and problem-solving. I understood that language is just the way of writing, but programming logic is what truly matters.
The need to learn about web development arose in me. Thus, I self-taught myself its technologies and decided to take elective courses in my degree related to Web Development.
My heart is divided between my passion for computers (and low-level programming) and web development. Merging both worlds is how I want to contribute to the world of technology.
